query_strategy: Multiple YouTube search.list requests, each targeting a specific media intent.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find explanatory video, documentary context, archival footage, or scene history.
query_candidates.q: DJ Kool Herc 1520 Sedgwick Avenue 1973 hip hop origins documentary

request_params.q: DJ Kool Herc 1520 Sedgwick Avenue 1973 hip hop origins documentary

query_candidates.reason: The event is a canonized origin story tied to a specific person, place, and year, making documentary context a strong fit.
review_risks: Check whether videos distinguish the historical event from later anniversary coverage.
Prefer sources that cite the date, 1520 Sedgwick Avenue, or DJ Kool Herc directly.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find artist, DJ, producer, venue, or oral-history interview material.
query_candidates.reason: DJ Kool Herc is directly named, so oral-history material can provide relevant firsthand or retrospective context.
review_risks: Check whether the interview is with Kool Herc or a reliable historian, not only a generic hip-hop commentator.
Do not treat memory-based claims as sufficient without external source support.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find a DJ set, break mix, party mix, turntablism demonstration, or historically framed mix.
query_candidates.q: DJ Kool Herc Bronx breaks party DJ mix 1973

request_params.q: DJ Kool Herc Bronx breaks party DJ mix 1973

query_candidates.reason: A DJ mix can represent the break-based party sound associated with Kool Herc, while staying separate from claims about the exact 1973 set.
review_risks: Check whether the mix is presented as a reconstruction, tribute, or general context.
Do not imply the mix documents the actual Back-to-School Jam.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find a YouTube playlist, mix, or curated song collection that matches the event context.
query_candidates.q: DJ Kool Herc early hip hop breaks Bronx party playlist 1973

request_params.q: DJ Kool Herc early hip hop breaks Bronx party playlist 1973

query_candidates.reason: A playlist can approximate the sound-world of early Bronx party practice, even though the exact 1973 set list is not the event data.
review_risks: Check whether playlist descriptions claim evidence for specific tracks.
Keep playlist links framed as context, not as a documented set list.

omitted_intents.reason: The event is a party and origin-story context, not a specific recording or release.

review_notes: Check whether results are historically relevant before adding links.
Keep all automatically found links as draft until editorial review.
Verify channel/source quality before promoting any media link to reviewed.
